use_cases: Add satisfying click feedback to interactive cards and buttons
Enhance user engagement with animated micro-interactions
Provide visual confirmation for touch or click events
Create playful UI experiences in modern web applications
ai_summary: An interactive click feedback component that spawns an animated plus sign (+) at the exact click position on a card. Features smooth CSS animations with a 600ms duration, dark mode support, and a clean minimalist aesthetic. Ideal for adding engaging micro-interactions to buttons, cards, or any clickable UI elements in modern applications.
